titleStmt.title: SII 17.609: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 609. (A.R. No. 564 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the second prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.
This record commences with the praśasti Pūmālai miḍaindu etc., of Vikramachōḷa. The details of date given are the same as in the foregoing number.
This records the sale-deed (vilaiyāvaṇam) pertaining to the transaction recorded in No. 608 above.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . pūmālai miṭaintu ponmālai tikaḻtarap pāmālai maliṉta parumaṇittiraḷpuyat tiru nila maṭaṉtaiyoṭu jayamakaḷiruppa kanavarai mārvan taṉa tenappeṟṟu tirumakaḷoru taniyiruppa kalaimakaḷ coṟṟiṟam puṇarnta kaṟpi(n)ṉaḷāki viruppoṭu nāvakattiruppat ticaitoṟum tikiri yo
ṭu ceṅkol naṭappa Akila puvanamum kavippator putu matipola veṇkuṭai mīmicai niṟppa karuṅkali Oḷittu vaṇpilattiṭaik kiṭappak kuḷattiṭait teliṅka vimaṉ vilaṅkal micai yeṟavum kaliṅka pūmiyaik kaṉaleri parukavum Aimpaṭaip paruvattu vempaṭai tāṅkiyum veṅkai maṇṭalattāṅ kinitiruntu vaṭaticai
Aṭippaṭuttaruḷi tenṟicait tarumamum tavamum tānamum taḻaippa Ātiyukam pol talaittalai ciṟappa vantaruḷi vilaṟkarum poṟpuli yāṇai pāttivarcūṭa niṟai maṇimakuṭam muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭi tan koyil vācaṟpuṟattu maṇi nāvoṭuṅka vicaiyamum pukaḻum meṉmeloṅka ceḻiyar veñcurampuka ceralar kaṭal puka Aḻitaruciṅ
kaḷar Añci neñcalamara kaṅkar tiṟaiyiṭa kanṉaṭar venniṭa koṅkarotuṅka koṅkaṇar cāya maṟṟetticai mannarum tantamak karaṇena tirumalar cevaṭi Urimaiyi liṟañca tollai Eḻulakum toḻuteḻat tonṟi mullai vāṇakai mukko kiḻānaṭi U(ri)maiyoṭu caṅkara nimaiyattiruntenap poruntiyuṭa(uṭa)niruppa Ā
ṅkavan makiḻum kaṅkaiyoppāki teviyar tilatam tiyākapatākai purikuḻal maṭappiṭi punitakuṇavanitai tiripuvanamuṭaiyāḷ Avaṉ tiruviḷantaruḷ tuṭaiyāḷena Uṭaniruppa cempoṉ virasiṅhāsanattu mukko kiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecari panmarāṉa tribhuvanacakravattikaḷ śrīvikramacoḻadevarkku yāṇṭu
nālāvatu Iṣabha nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu tritiyaiyum putankiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvātiraiṉāḷ kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu veḷānāṭṭu brahmateyam tirunallūr peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom keyamāṇikkavaḷanāṭṭut tiruvārur kūṟṟattu tiruvārur śrīmulastānamuṭaiyār koyil rājanārayaṇan tirumaṇṭapa
ttu nāṅkaḷ kūṭṭaṅkuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu Ikkoyil Āticaṇṭeśvara devarkku niḷa vilaiyāvaṇam cayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattu maṇavil koṭṭattu maṇavil Arum pākkiḻān maturāntakan ponṉampalak kūttanāṉa poṟkoyil toṇṭaimānār It tevarkku ceṅkaḻunīr tiruppaḷḷittāmam cātti Aruḷukaikku
Idadevarkku kuḷaṅ koḷkaikku Idadevar śrībhaṇṭārattu Oṭukkina kācu nūṟu Ikkācu nūṟināl rājarājan māṭaiyoṭokkum Aṉṟāṭu cempon muppattu Iru kaḻañ caraikkum ṉāṅkaḷ viṟṟu kuṭutta kuḷamāvatu Eṅkaḷuril neṭuṅkuḷameṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa kuḷam viṟṟukkuṭuppataṟku kiḻpāṟkellai Ūril ninṟum vaṭakku nokkip pona peruvaḻikkum viḷākattil
nāṟṟaṅkālkaḷukkum śrīvaikuntattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya Ulokamādevi viṇṇakar Āḻvār tirunandavanattukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai Idadevar tirunandavanattukkum śrīkai muṭaiya devar tirunandavanattukkum pakṣiyār nilattukkum tirumuṟṟattukkum piṭāriyār śrīkoyilum tirumuṟṟattukkum pāṇṭi nāṭṭu ceri koppaṭṭaṅkaḷil Innāḷ varai
yil Ivarkaḷ Anupavikkiṟa nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai rājen=tira coḻan vāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai rājen=tira coḻan vāykkālukkum Utaiyan nārāyaṇan kaṇṇapirā num Āttiraiyannā ṇan paḷḷikoṇṭā num yan śrī mantai cirāmabhaṭṭanum māntūpan caṅkaranārāyaṇan cirāmabhaṭṭa num Āttiraiyan perum puṟakkaṭal tivākarabhaṭṭanum
pārācariyan kaṇṇan Aḻakiya maṇavāḷabhaṭṭanum [ gotaman] Ātittan [pavaṉā n]bhaṭṭanum Uḷḷiṭṭār nilaṅkaḷil koḻakkuttikkukku teṟkum Ākaivvicainta perunānkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa [nila*m] Iraṇṭe mukkāle cinnamum mikitikkuṟaivu Uḷḷaṭaṅka viṟṟuk kuṭuttu koṇṭa Anṟāṭu cempon muppattiru kaḻañcaraiyināl Anṟāṭu naṟkācu nūṟu Ikkācu nūṟum Āvaṇakkaḷiye kāṭṭeṟṟi kaiccela
vaṟa koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom Ivvāticaṇṭeśvaradevarkku Ip peruṅkuṟi mahā[ sabhai] yom Ipparicu nāṅkaḷ viṟṟuk kuṭutta kuḷattukku veṭṭi muṭṭaiyāḷ velikkācu Eccoṟṟuk kūṟṟarici tiruvācal ponta kuṭimai Epperp paṭṭutum ceyyakkaṭavarallātārākavum Ikkuḷataita cūḻnta nālukaraiyilum teṅku Uḷpaṭṭa vṛkṣaṅkaḷ vaiccu Anupavikka pe
ṟuvārākavum Ikkuḷattil Iṭāiṟaikka kaṭavo mallātomākavum kuḷattil ninṟu pāyum niru vāri ko[*ḷ]ḷap peṟuvomākavum Ikkuḷattukku paṇṭāṭu paḻanaṭai pāyavum vāravum peṟuvitākavum Ipparicu Icaintu Ikkācu nūṟuṅkoṇṭu Ikkuḷam viṟṟukkuṭut tom Āticaṇṭeśvavaradevarkku Ipperuṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom Ippiramāṇappaṭiye kalliluñ cempilum
veṭṭikkoḷḷap peṟuvitāka sammatittu viṟṟukkuṭuttom Āticaṇṭeśvara devarkku tirunallūr peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom . Ivarkaḷpaṇiyāl Ippiramāṇam Eḻutinen Ittiru nallūr madhyastan mārakkamaṅkalamuṭaiyān maticūtantillaivanamuṭaiyā neḻuttu [..] Ippaṭikki vai bhāradvāji kūttāṭi centapirān bhaṭṭaneḻuttu �. Itu śrīkṛ
ṣṇa cirāmabhaṭṭan sayijñaiyānamaikku Ivvūr karaṇattān mārakkamaṅkalammuṭaiyā neḻuttu Ippaṭikku vaṅkippuṟattu pūcāḷi tiruveṅkaṭapaṭṭa neḻuttu Ippaṭikku bhāradvāji Aḻakiya maṇavāḷabhaṭṭaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku mānattan caṅkaranārāyaṇan cūriyabhaṭṭaneḻuttu . Ippaṭi kavicikaṉ cirāgavun sayijñaiyātamaikku mārakkamaṅ
Digital edition of SII 17.609 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
